channel.title: Deeptech Daily
channel.description: A short daily briefing on deeptech, robotics, and space startups.
channel.itunes:author: Deeptech Daily

item.title: Blue Origin's Comeback Plan + SpaceX Has a Secret AI Phone?
item.description:
Hey everyone, welcome back to Deeptech Daily. It's Thursday, July 02, 2026, and we've got a packed show today — rockets, robots, a surprise product leak from SpaceX, and some big moves in the funding world. Let's get into it.
We're going to start with Blue Origin, because this is a genuinely...

item.title: NASA's $600M Moon Push + A Startup Wants 100K Data Centers in Orbit
item.description:
Hey everyone, welcome to Deeptech Daily. It's Wednesday, July 01, 2026, and we've got a packed show today — moon missions, orbital data centers, major robotics money, and more. Let's get into it.
We're starting with a big one out of NASA. The agency just awarded nearly $600 million across four...

item.title: Rocket Lab's $8B Iridium Bombshell + NASA's Telescope Rescue Mission
item.description:
Hey everyone, welcome back to Deeptech Daily. It's Tuesday, June 30, 2026, and we have a genuinely wild day in space and robotics news — let's get into it.
Okay, the story everyone is talking about: Rocket Lab is acquiring Iridium Communications for eight billion dollars. That's an all-stock deal,...

item.title: AGIBOT's 15,000th Robot + Euclid Peers Into the Milky Way's Heart
item.description:

item.title: Musk Buys SpaceX Alumni Startup + $320M to Train Robots with Video Games
item.description:

item.title: Starlink Vets Go Independent + Europe's Orbit Security Wake-Up Call
item.description:

item.title: Agility Robotics Goes Public + China's Reusable Rocket Debut
item.description:

item.title: SpaceX's Secret Reentry Capsule + Agility Robotics Goes Public
item.description:
